goal: Improve Local Engine performance without adding heavyweight NLP dependencies or new UI.

steps.name: alias-dictionary-contract
steps.summary: Strengthened the alias dictionary contract with approved/pending metadata and ensured canonicalization only uses approved aliases.

steps.name: pending-alias-preservation
steps.summary: Preserved pending alias candidates in chat messages, shared LLM context, and Import local facts without adding UI.

steps.name: alias-aware-scoring
steps.summary: Improved Knowledge DB similarity scoring so normalized signature keys can compare across Structure, Contact Structure, and Contact Type, using the best matching target value.

steps.name: verification
steps.summary: Added local-engine performance smoke script and package script, but TypeScript/build/smoke execution requiring node_modules escalation was blocked by the Codex usage-limit gate. Static checks passed: harness policy and git diff whitespace check.
